variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 5080 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 5080 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 5080 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter CU 2567 Cabin Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5080
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER cabin filters offer almost 100% protection against particles such as pollen, diesel soot and tyre abrasion - for a feel-good climate in the vehicle interior and protection of the air conditioning system. Exact fit and perfect tightness ensure constant filtration performance during the entire service interval / Optimum vehicle interior ventilation due to the high air flow capacity.
